/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW60/LDPX: 05-23-22 (60TH)/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BYTHE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A SCRAM DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORINGDEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALLINSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X: COURT RECOMMENDS ALCOHOL MANAGEMENT CLASSES/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE 04-14-22 DEPT 9/DOP/
